text: This place feels eerily silent and empty, illuminated only by cold artificial light in the first scene and enveloped in darkness in the second. I sense a distant hum of humanity's pursuit—perhaps this is an environment once filled with the bustle of research and development, now at rest. The absence of people makes me reflective, yet a little uneasy, as though I am trespassing into the stillness of ideas waiting to be awakened.
